title: rubus ketzkhovelii
intro: Rubus ketzkhovelii, also known as the Korean raspberry or Korean bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Korea and parts of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus ketzkhovelii are said to include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. In traditional herbal preparations, Rubus ketzkhovelii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide a range of health benefits when consumed.
